abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by crafting a useful item using your specialty, or when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair} to create or repair an item in a perilous situation, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
As above, and you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1, choose after rolling) to add an additional +1.

When you give the item you create as a gift to commemorate an important event or relationship, you may (one time only) reroll any dice when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.8704c945023355fb]{Test Your Relationship}.
